promising_phases.notes: Phase1b with Glass off after 1M; tests earlier handoff from Glass shaping to actor learning
Phase1b + temp-stability 0.01 with Glass off after 2M; tests late policy consolidation
Phase1b with Glass off after 2M, no temp-stability/no smooth; current off-schedule handoff probe
Auto-restart low early returns; tests whether bad basin seeds can be rescued by restart
Phase1b off after 1.5M on hard seed 4; stress-test midpoint handoff
Warmup 500k + temp-stability 0.01 + latent smooth; tests delayed Glass pressure
Glass V2 temp-stability 0.05; tested stronger temporal assignment stability
